description_long: This is a large, freestanding fax machine with a robust rectangular body, primarily finished in light gray with darker gray accents. The top section features a sloped automatic document feeder with a visible paper input tray and a prominent control panel on the front right, which includes numerous buttons and a display screen. Below the control panel, there are multiple paper drawers and access panels, likely for paper storage and maintenance, with subtle handles and indicator lights. The sides of the machine are mostly flat, with some ventilation grilles and access panels visible. The machine stands on four small caster wheels, making it potentially mobile within an office or urban environment. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear separation between the control interface, paper handling areas, and storage compartments.
description: A large, freestanding fax machine with a sloped document feeder, prominent control panel, and multiple paper drawers in a light and dark gray color scheme. The design is functional, with clear access to controls and paper trays.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main control panel, document feeder, and three stacked paper drawers.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying flat panels, ventilation grilles, and the side profile of the document feeder.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back panel, additional vents, and the rear side of the document feeder.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the control panel, side access panels, and the paper drawers.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the upper right front of the machine, angled for easy access. It features a cluster of tactile buttons arranged in rows, a small display screen positioned centrally, and indicator lights above or beside the buttons. The layout is compact, with the numeric keypad and function buttons grouped together, and additional controls for navigation and operation placed nearby.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper trays are located at the lower front of the machine, stacked vertically with visible handles for pulling out. Each tray appears to be fully enclosed, likely with adjustable guides inside, and designed to hold a substantial quantity of paper.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned at the front, just below the control panel and above the topmost paper drawer, with a recessed area to catch printed or faxed documents.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visibly present or attached to the body of the machine in any of the views.
